mission.title: helm: Install chart from registry
mission.description: Install chart from registry. Requested by 66+ users.

steps.title: Check current helm deployment
steps.description:
Verify your helm version and configuration:
```bash
helm list --all-namespaces 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working helm installation.

steps.title: Review helm configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant helm configuration:
```bash
helm version
```
Hi dream team community!

This is a little feature request: **Install chart from registry**

## Before

```
helm registry login
helm chart pull ...
helm chart export ... ./charts
helm install ...

steps.title: Apply the fix for Install chart from registry
steps.description:
Hello,

I currently work on this issue ; https://github.com/helm/helm/issues/6982

Status: Work in progress
Time estimated: ~2 weeks
```yaml
helm install gcr.io/my-project/my-chart@sha256:xxx --from-registry
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
helm version
```
Confirm the feature described in "Install chart from registry" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Hello,

I currently work on this issue ; https://github.com/helm/helm/issues/6982

Status: Work in progress
Time estimated: ~2 weeks
codeSnippets:
helm upgrade \
  some-name \
  oci@some.regist.ry/some-chart \
  --username my-user \
  --password my-password \
  --install \
  --set some-key=some-value \
  --namespace some-namespace \
  --wait

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with helm installed or the issue environment reproducible.
